make-a-squid-recipe-with-black-olives-co.name: Make A Squid Recipe With Black Olives
make-a-squid-recipe-with-black-olives-co.original_name: Haz una rápida receta de calamares con aceitunas negras

ingredients.item: 500 gr de calamares frescos, limpios y cortados en anillos
3 cdas de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)

instructions: We start the recipe by rinsing the cramps and drying them well with absorbent paper.
In a large frying pan, heats olive oil with medium heat and adds minced garlic and pits until golden.
Agrega los calamares y cocina durante 2-3 minutos, removiendo constantemente.
It incorporates black olives, parsley, juice and lemon frying. Cooking for another 3 minutes till the squids are tender.
Reaping the date with salt and pepper to taste.
It serves hot, decorated with an additional touch of parsley. Enjoy!

make-ahead-cheesy-chicken-enchiladas.name: Make-ahead Cheesy Chicken Enchiladas
instructions: Spray a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Mix chicken, 1 1/2 cup Mexican cheese, roasted peppers, chile peppers, and sour cream in a bowl until well combined.
Heat enchilada sauce in a 12-inch frying pan. Dip a tortilla in the sauce until well coated and slightly softened. Top with 1/2 cup chicken mixture.

Roll up tortilla and place seam side-down in the prepared baking dish. Repeat with remaining tortillas and chicken mixture. Top enchiladas with remaining sauce and sprinkle with remaining cheese. Spray a sheet of foil with cooking spray, and place it greased side down on the dish; seal to cover.
Refrigerate until ready to cook, up to 2 days.
When ready to bake, remove enchiladas from the refrigerator and let sit for 30 minutes. Keep foil cover on.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbly, about 1 hour.

mala-fried-peanuts.name: Mala Fried Peanuts

ingredients.item: Sliced dried licorice root or fennel seeds
Dried sichuan chiles or other red chinese chiles
ingredients.prep: 8 with seeds removed, cut into strips, 10 left whole

ingredients.item: A spice mill or coffee grinder

instructions: Toast cassia, star anise, cloves, sand ginger (if using), Sichuan peppercorns, licorice root, black peppercorns, and white peppercorns (if using) in a small skillet over medium, tossing once, until fragrant, about 3 minutes. Let cool; grind to a powder in spice mill or coffee grinder.
Do Ahead: Five-Spice Powder can be made 1 month ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
If using unblanched (skin-on) peanuts, place in a medium bowl and pour in water to cover. Let soak at least 6 hours and up to 12 hours. Drain peanuts, then rub off skins with paper towels if needed.

Arrange peanuts on a rimmed baking sheet and freeze at least 2 hours and up to 12 hours (this will dehydrate the nuts so that they crisp faster when fried). If using blanched peanuts, skip the soaking and freeze directly.

Place frozen peanuts in a wok or medium pot and pour in oil to cover by ¼". Bring to a simmer over medium heat and cook until peanuts are golden brown and float to the surface, 15–20 minutes. Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer to paper towels to drain. Let oil cool. Transfer all but 1 tsp. oil to an airtight container; save for another use.

Add sliced chiles, whole chiles, and whole Sichuan peppercorns to skillet with oil and heat over medium-high, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 2 minutes (don’t let the chiles brown—you want them to stay red). Mix in peanuts, salt, sugar, ground Sichuan peppercorns, white pepper (if using), and 1 tsp. Five-Spice Powder. Transfer to a small bowl; let cool.
Do Ahead: Peanuts can be made 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

marys-gone-crackers-copycat.name: Mary's Gone Crackers Copycat
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Cut a small square out of a separate sheet of parchment paper and oil 1 side; set aside.

Blend brown rice, quinoa, and tamari in a food processor, adding water if mixture is too dry, until a dough starts to form. Add chia seeds, sesame seeds, flax seeds, and salt; pulse until dough is a sticky ball.

Roll small pieces of dough into 1/2-inch balls and arrange at least 2 1/2 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet. Place the oiled square of parchment paper, oil-side down, onto a dough ball. Flatten the dough ball into a very thin 2-inch-wide disk by pressing the top of a small jar onto the parchment square. Repeat with remaining dough balls.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges of crackers begin to brown, 10 to 12 minutes. Transfer crackers to a wire rack. Place the rack onto the baking sheet and return to oven.
Bake until crackers are dry and crisp, 2 to 3 minutes more.

masala-tea-creme-pies.name: Masala Tea Creme Pies

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 375°. Melt ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter in a small skillet over medium-low heat (don’t let it boil). Stir in 1 Tbsp. black tea leaves (from about 3 bags), then pour into a medium bowl, scraping pan to get all the bits of tea. Let butter mixture sit until barely warm, about 10 minutes.

Add 1 large egg, ¾ cup (150 g) granulated sugar, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract to butter mixture and mix vigorously with a rubber spatula until smooth. Add ¼ tsp. baking powder, ¼ tsp. baking soda, and ¼ tsp. ground cinnamon and mix again to combine. Add 1½ cups (187 g) all-purpose flour and mix until no dry streaks remain, making sure to scrape sides and bottom of bowl.

Divide dough into 32 portions (2 tsp. or 14 g each; easiest way to do this is
to divide dough into quarters, then divide each quarter into 8 pieces). Roll each
portion into a ball. Divide balls between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing
evenly apart.

Working with 1 baking sheet at a time, bake cookies until puffed and dry to the touch, 6–8 minutes. Let cool on baking sheets.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be baked 5 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

Using an electric mixer, starting on low speed and moving to medium, beat ¾ cup (83 g) powdered sugar, sifted, 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, 1 tsp. (packed) finely grated peeled ginger, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. ground cardamom, and ½ tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract in a medium bowl until smooth and fluffy, about 3 minutes (or, you can use a whisk).

Transfer filling to a pastry bag fitted with a medium round tip. Turn half of the cookies over and pipe kisses of filling onto flat sides, dividing evenly (alternatively, you can dollop a heaping 1 tsp. filling onto each one). Place remaining cookies, right side up, on top, gently pressing until filling spreads almost to edges of cookies. Chill creme pies 10 minutes to allow filling to firm slightly before serving.
Do Ahead: Creme pies can be assembled 2 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container and chill. Bring to room temperature before serving.

meat-noodles-lezzet.name: Meat Noodles
instructions: 1. until the salty water softens the tribute, and from the water to pass and strain.
2. Cut the meat into strips and cook with 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
3. Clean the peppers clean and chop them in thin strips.
4. Cook the pepper and fine sliced vegetables in a separate pan with the olive oil; the fire.
5.  Soya sosu, karabiber ve etleri ilave edin.
6. Add and mix well.
7. Take the service plate and sprinkle the sesame roasted sesame.
8. Serve hot.

meatballs.name: Meatballs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a rimmed baking sheet with foil. Spray foil lightly with cooking spray.

Combine onion, bread crumbs, half-and-half, Parmesan cheese, eggs, egg yolk, garlic, basil, parsley, and oregano in a large bowl; stir until well combined. Add ground round and sausage and sprinkle evenly with salt and pepper. Mix well until just combined.
Dampen hands with water and form mixture into 18 golf ball-sized meatballs. Arrange meatballs on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until browned, 12 to 15 minutes.
Transfer meatballs to a large pot and add marinara sauce. Simmer over low heat for at least 2 hours before serving.

meatballs-with-spinach-and-greens-argiro.name: Meatballs With Spinach And Greens

ingredients.item: Flour that swells itself (as much as it takes)
Flour that swells itself (as much as it takes)

instructions: Finely chop the vegetables first and place them in bowls along with the other ingredients.
Add flour as much as it takes to tighten the mixture and have a thick porridge standing.
Add a pan with olive oil to the heat and as soon as it burns, add a spoonful of the mixture and pour it in.
We are careful that the temperature is not too strong and the meatballs cannot be cooked from the inside.
Before each spoon, dip the spoon in a glass of water so that the meatballs fall nicely into the oil.
Once golden, turn the meatballs, and when they are colored, we remove them on a platter with absorbent paper.
Are you looking for delicious recipes? Find them all here!

meatless-eggplant-lasagna.name: Meatless Eggplant Lasagna
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Coat 2 baking sheets and a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.

Whisk 2 eggs and water together in a shallow dish. Combine panko and 1/4 cup Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese in a separate shallow dish. Dip eggplant slices into egg mixture, letting excess drip off. Gently press into panko mixture to adhere and coat both sides, shaking off excess. Place on the prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden, about 30 minutes, flipping eggplant and rotating baking sheets after 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine ricotta cheese, basil, 1/4 cup Parmigiano-Reggiano, 1 egg, garlic, pepper flakes, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in a bowl.

Spoon 1/2 cup marinara sauce into the prepared baking dish. Layer 1/2 eggplant slices over sauce; sprinkle with 1/8 teaspoon salt. Top with 3/4 cup marinara sauce. Spread 1/2 ricotta mixture on top; add 1/2 bell peppers and top with 1/3 mozzarella cheese and 1/4 Fontina cheese. Repeat layers, ending with 1 cup marinara sauce. Cover dish tightly with aluminum foil coated with cooking spray.
Bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes.
Remove aluminum foil; top with remaining 1/3 mozzarella cheese and 1/2 Fontina cheese. Continue baking until sauce is bubbly and cheese melts, about 10 minutes more. Cool before serving, 10 minutes.

meatloaf-with-egg-teleculinaria.name: Meatloaf With Egg
instructions: Season the meat with chopped onion, garlic powder, salt and pepper and mix.
Spread the meat around the bottom and sides in an English cake-like way, pressing well. Have the cream cheese in the center and form five cavities in it.
Lay an egg in each cavity, season with a pinch of salt and cover with the cheese slices. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 45 minutes. Serve sliced.

meringue-sundae-with-peppery-berry-sauce.name: Meringue Sundae With Peppery Berry Sauce

ingredients.prep: flaky sea salt, and basil leaves (for serving)

instructions: Cook strawberries, raspberries, brown sugar, liqueur, pepper, and kosher salt in a small pot over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until sauce is thickened, about 8 minutes. Let cool to room temperature.
Arrange cookies and ice cream scoops on a plate. Spoon berry sauce over, then top with oil, sea salt, and basil.
Do Ahead: Sauce can be made 1 day ahead. Transfer to an airtight container and chill. Let come to room temperature before serving.

mexican-beef-soup-with-beans-and-bacon.name: Mexican Beef Soup With Beans And Bacon

ingredients.item: Homemade beef stock or low-sodium beef broth
Cooked mayocoba beans or 3 pinto beans (from two 15-ounce cans)

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise if large, or 1 medium white onion, cut into 8 wedges
sliced radishes, sliced avocado, and warm corn tortillas (for serving)

instructions: Bring tomatillos, chiles, garlic, stock, and ½ cup cilantro to a simmer in a large saucepan over medium-high heat. Simmer 10 minutes. Let cool slightly, then transfer to a blender and blend until smooth. Return to pot and add beans; keep warm.
Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat until brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to paper towels. Let cool, then crumble.
Toast chiles in bacon fat over medium heat, tossing occasionally, until just beginning to darken. Transfer to plate with bacon. Wipe out skillet or wash to remove any dark spots.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in skillet over medium. Cook spring onions, cut side down, until browned, about 5 minutes. Transfer to pot with beans. Add remaining 1 Tbsp. oil to skillet and increase heat to medium-high. Season steak with salt and pepper and cook until deep brown all over, about 5 minutes per side (it should be well browned on both sides but can be very rare in the center as it will cook more in the soup). Transfer to a cutting board and let rest at least 10 minutes before slicing against the grain about ¼" thick. Cut crosswise into 1" pieces. Add to soup; taste and season with salt and pepper if needed.
Serve soup topped with bacon, chiles, cilantro, white onion, radishes, and avocado, with tortillas alongside.

migas-miles-of-turnip-greens-teleculinar.name: Migas Miles Of Turnip Greens
instructions: Break the bread into pieces and crush it. Peel the garlic, pick them and praise them slightly in a pot with the oil and the blond.
Junte o bacalhau lascado, limpo de peles e espinhas. Deixe cozinhar em lume brando, mexendo de vez em quando. Reserve uma parte do bacalhau cozinhado para decorar.
Add the already cooked bread and turnips and cut into pieces, and wrap. Add the cowpea, season with salt and pepper and stir. Remove from the fire and eliminate the blond.
Have the previous preparation on a serving plate. Water with a string of olive oil and decorate with the remaining cod and some friar beans.

mighty-fine-turkey-brine.name: Mighty Fine Turkey Brine
instructions: Combine 2 1/2 cups water and salt in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until salt is dissolved, about 3 minutes.
Pour water and salt mixture into a 5-gallon bucket. Add 1 gallon of water.
Combine 2 1/2 cups water and brown sugar in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until sugar is dissolved, about 3 minutes. Pour into the bucket.
Stir apple juice, whiskey, and lemon juice into the bucket. Add chopped apple. Squeeze in orange juice and add in rinds.

mimosa-salad-lezzet.name: Mimosa Salad
instructions: 1. Potatoes, carrots and beet are eaten pots.
2.  The vegetables are tasted with salt and pepper.
3.  Maydanoz and dereotu are fine.
4. Pickled small, cut cube cube.
5. A small roughly crushed potatoes with clamp is kneeed.
6. Mayonnaise swollen and continued.
7. U carrot butter and reindeed in the car; a part of the greenery is added, mayonnaise swollen Home
8. The most uniform and reindeed beet is added in the body.
9. The salad filled with bowl is removed and served after cooling.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

mini-butter-tarts.name: Mini Butter Tarts
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Place tart shells on a baking tray.
Beat brown sugar and butter together in a bowl until creamy; beat in eggs, cream, and vanilla extract until combined. Fill tart shells 2/3 full with butter mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until pastry is lightly golden, about 18 minutes; remove to cool on a wire rack.

mirandela-olive-oil-pudding-teleculinari.name: Mirandela Olive Oil Pudding
instructions: Put 150 g of sugar in a pot, soak it with a little water and bring it to the fire without moving until you get a caramel. Remove from the flame, water with 50 ml of water, stir well and caramelize a shape.
Boil 400 ml of water with the remaining sugar, cinnamon stick and lemon peel for 10 minutes. After that time, remove the oil from the fire. Reject the cinnamon stick and the lemon peel.

Beat the yolks and eggs in a bowl and add the previous preparation, in yarn and stirring always. Lay in the form and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for 50 minutes. Remove, let cool, deform and serve decorated to taste.

moist-chocolate-cake-teleculinaria.name: Moist Chocolate Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 degrees. Melt 475 g of chocolate, broken into pieces, together with butter, in the microwave or in a sea bath.
In a bowl, beat your eggs with sugar until they're off-white. Add the chocolate and stir. Then add the flour, previously sifted, and wrap it a little more.
Unte uma forma retangular com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha. Deite a massa na forma e leve ao forno durante 25 minutos. Retire do forno e leve ao frio durante 1 hora.
After the specified time, take a pot to the fire with the creams and let it boil. Add the remaining chocolate, broken into pieces, and stir well until melted and shiny.
Unform the cake on a platter or tray and throw over the chocolate sauce. Serve with decor to taste.

monas-refrigerator-pickles.name: Mona's Refrigerator Pickles
instructions: Stir sugar, salt, and vinegar together in a clean non-reactive jar or container with a secure lid until sugar is mostly dissolved.

Add cucumbers and onion into vinegar solution; stir to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 to 2 days before serving for the best flavor, stirring occasionally. Keep any remaining pickles refrigerated.

moo-palo-thai-pork-belly-stew-with-eggs.name: Moo Palo (thai Pork Belly Stew With Eggs)
instructions: {'level': '1', 'description': 'For the Dipping Sauce: In a granite mortar and pestle, combine garlic, a small pinch of kosher salt, and chiles and pound until a coarse paste forms, about 30 seconds. Add sugar and continue to pound into a mostly fine paste (some larger pieces are okay), about 1 minute. Stir in vinegar, transfer to a small bowl, and set aside. Wipe out mortar and pestle.'}

{'level': '2', 'description': 'For the Stew: In now-empty mortar and pestle, add peppercorns and pound until fine, about 20 seconds. Add coriander roots, garlic, and salt and continue to pound until a fine paste has formed, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and set aside.'}

{'level': '3', 'description': 'In a Dutch oven, heat oil over high heat until shimmering. Add pork belly and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer pork belly to a medium bowl and set aside.'}
{'level': '4', 'description': 'Reduce heat to low. Add palm sugar and cook, stirring and scraping bottom occasionally, until caramelized and deep golden brown, about 3 minutes.'}

{'level': '5', 'description': 'Stir in cinnamon sticks, star anise, five-spice powder, and reserved pepper-coriander paste and cook until the aroma is released, about 15 seconds; you may need to move the pan off the heat to avoid burning the sugar. Return pork belly to pot and stir until thoroughly coated with the caramelized sugar sauce, about 1 minute.'}

{'level': '6', 'description': 'Add 10 cups (2.3L) water and bring to a boil over high heat. Once boiling, skim any scum that accumulates on the surface, then stir in fish sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and black soy sauce. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer, cover, and cook until the pork is tender, about 1 hour 20 minutes. Remove from heat and add eggs, stirring to make sure they’re fully coated in the sauce. Cover and let stand to allow eggs to absorb sauce, about 30 minutes.'}
{'level': '7', 'description': 'Serve immediately with dipping sauce and cooked jasmine rice.'}

mujadara.name: Mujadara
instructions: Bring a large pot of generously salted water to a boil. Meanwhile, place ½ cup raisins in a small bowl. Squeeze in juice from one half of lemon and pour 1 Tbsp. very hot water over. This will plump them up. Stir to combine; set aside until ready to use.

Halve and peel 4 medium onions. Go ahead and suit up with some protective eyewear, if that’s necessary for you. Thinly slice onions into half-moons (you should have about 7 cups). This is a fair amount of slicing, but it’s almost the only knifework.

Caramelize the onions: Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a large skillet over medium. Add onions and stir to coat in oil. Season with salt, then reduce heat to low and cover skillet (use a baking sheet if you don’t have a lid). Cook, stirring occasionally, until onions are softened and translucent, about 15 minutes. In this step, the onions steam in the liquid they release, which ensures that they'll caramelize more evenly, with less chance of burning.

Uncover skillet and sprinkle onions with ½ tsp. sugar, which increases caramelization. Increase heat to medium-high and continue to cook onions, stirring frequently and reducing heat as needed, and adding 1 Tbsp. water to deglaze pan (that is, scrape up all those brown bits) if it’s getting too dry, until chocolatey-brown and reduced in size by about two-thirds, 35–40 minutes.

Meanwhile, add 1 cup French green lentils to boiling salted water. Stir so there are no sinkers or stickers, then cook, stirring occasionally, until cooked through but still al dente, 20–25 minutes. Drain and set aside. Wipe pot dry.

As lentils cook, rinse the rice. The easiest way to do this is to place 1 cup basmati rice in a medium bowl, cover with cold water, swish rice with your hand, then dump out the water in a swift, fluid motion (the rice will stay at the bottom of the bowl!). Repeat twice. Set rice aside to drain in a fine-mesh sieve.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in same pot over medium-high until hot. Add ¼ tsp. ground cinnamon, 2 tsp. ground coriander, and 2 tsp. ground cumin and cook, stirring, until fragrant and a shade darker, about 30 seconds.

Add rice and 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton salt and stir to coat the rice in the spices, about 30 seconds. Pour in 1½ cups water and bring to a boil (it might happen almost immediately!). Reduce heat to lowest setting, cover with lentils in an even layer, and cover pot. Cook, undisturbed, until water is absorbed, about 15 minutes. Fluff with a fork and cover pot again.

Your onions should be caramelized by now! Add raisins (and any liquid in bowl) and stir to combine. Transfer onion mixture to pot with rice. Add half of fried shallots and juice from remaining lemon half. Stir to combine, season with salt, and keep covered until ready to use.

Now the finishing touches. Coarsely chop ½ cup parsley leaves with tender stems. Mix ½ cup plain Greek yogurt and remaining 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, ¼ tsp. coriander, and ¼ tsp. cumin in a small bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
Transfer mujadara to a platter. Top with parsley and remaining fried shallots. Serve with yogurt sauce alongside.

murcian-michirones-traditional-bean-stew.name: Murcian Michirones (traditional Bean Stew Recipe)
murcian-michirones-traditional-bean-stew.original_name: Michirones murcianos (receta de guiso de habas tradicional)
instructions: Put the dried beans to be soaked in cold water from 24 to 48 hours. The mooring serves to smooth up and reduce cooking time. It also helps to remove impurities and improve their digestibility. To that end, the beans should be covered with cold water and let them stand at room temperature, in a large and covered container. After soaking, the beans should be rinsed well before cooking them.
In a big pot, put to cook the beans with enough water till they are tender. That process may take 1 to 2 hours, depending on the quality of the beans.
In a separate frying pan, golden the chorizo and panceta cut into small pieces and reserve.
In the same frying pan, add some oil and fry onion and garlic minced until golden.
Add sweet pimenton and remove well to mix with oil.
Add the frying to the cooked beans, with the chorizo and the pancette. Mix well and let them cook at medium heat for 20-30 minutes, till flavors are integrated.
Rectificar la sal al gusto y servir caliente.

mushroom-pie-pie-lezzet.name: Mushroom Pie Pie
instructions: 1. melt half water glass sunflower oil with 100 gr butter.
2. The necessary materials for dough knead in another container.
3. Adjust the amount of water according to the consistency of pulp.
4. Rest for 1 hour by covering it with a damp cloth.
5. Heat the olive oil in the pan for the inner mortar.
6. Add and so on the onions you’ve eaten in half a month.
7. Add the peppers that you've filled with gyneaks.
8. Add the mushrooms that you slice.
9. Finally add and mix salt and pepper.
10. Prepare 26 items.
11. 11. Open every bezeyi cake plate size.
12. Make 2 groups with 13 and remove from the sunflower mixture with butter that you melt between every bezenin except the last beze.
12. August Listen to 2 bezeyi in the refrigerator for 20 minutes.
14 July With the help of the Merdane, open the size of the square tray, sprinkled on the first bezeyi.
15. Place the oiled tray.
16. On the mushroom harper broadcasting.
17. September Open the remaining bezeyi in the same way.
18. Close the mushroom mortar.

21. Preheated 200 degree cook until fried in the oven.

mushroom-saute-and-delicious-recipe-come.name: Mushroom Sauté: And Delicious Recipe
mushroom-saute-and-delicious-recipe-come.original_name: Salteado rápido de champiñones: receta fácil y deliciosa

ingredients.item: 300 g of fresh mushrooms (cut into quarters)
1  cucharada de perejil fresco o cilantro (picado)
Newly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Clean mushrooms with a moist cloth or brush to remove any ground residue. Do not wash them directly under water as they can absorb and become less tasty while cooking.
He cuts his mushrooms into rooms, or half if they're small. Also cuts the pepper into small cubes and pits the garlic finely.
Warm a large frying pan with medium-high heat and add olive oil. Let the oil warm up well before we add the ingredients, because we want the mushrooms to get golden, and they don't cook.
Add mushrooms to frying pan and leap for about 3-4 minutes, sometimes stirring. See how they start releasing some water but keep cooking them till that water evapors.
Add garlic and pits of red pepper. It cooks everything together for another 2-3 minutes, and moves so that the garlic doesn't get burned.
Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste. If you care about the spicy, this would be a good time to add a pinch of chili powder or chili pits.
Once the mushrooms are golden and the peppers slightly soft but even with some texture, remove from the fire.
Espolvorea con perejil fresco o cilantro picado justo antes de servir para darle un toque de frescura y color.

mushroom-shrimp-and-pesto-pasta-lezzet.name: Mushroom, Shrimp And Pesto Pasta

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons of grated parmesan or old cheese Home

instructions: 1. Heat the half of the olive oil and roast garlic, tomatoes, fungi and shrimps for 10 minutes in high fire.
2. Add pasta, more than 5 minutes.
3. Add hot water, salt and remaining olive oil, up to 2 teaspoons.
4. Cook the pot for 10 minutes by closing the cover and stirring together.
5. Take the water from the stove, add and blend the grated parmesan cheese and heated cream.
6. Add the latest reyhan leaves.
7. Close the cover of the pot.
8. Serve hot after a while rest.

60-minute-apple-pie.name: 60-minute Apple Pie
instructions: Place a baking sheet in the oven, then preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C).
Peel the Golden Delicious and Gala apples, then slice into ⅛-inch (3 mm) thick wedges. Transfer to a large bowl.
Add the brown sugar, lemon juice, cornstarch, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt to the bowl with the apples and mix until the apples are well coated.

On a lightly floured surface, roll out a pie dough round to a 10-inch (25 cm) circle. Roll the dough around the rolling pin, brushing off any excess flour, then unroll into a 9-inch (24 cm) pie dish, making sure the dough is centered. Fill with the apple mixture. Refrigerate while you prepare the top crust.
Roll out the remaining pie dough round to a 12-inch (30 cm) circle. Cut out 6 1-inch (2.54 cm) strips and 8 ½-inch (21 cm) strips.

Lay the longest 1-inch (2.54 cm) strip vertically over the center of the pie, then 2 more 1-inch (2.54 cm) strips on either side. Place 2 ½-inch (6.5 cm) strips between each set of 1-inch (2.54 cm) strips. Fold back the 1-inch (2.54 cm) strips and place another 1-inch (2.54 cm) strip horizontally across the pie about ⅓ of the way down. Fold the vertical 1-inch (2.54 cm) strips back down. Continue adding the remaining ½-inch (1.24 cm) and 1-inch (2.54 cm) strips to create a lattice top.

Roll the excess dough around the edges inward toward the pie, tucking the ends in. Use your index finger on one hand and thumb and index finger on the other hand to crimp the edge. Brush off any excess flour, then brush the egg wash all over the dough. Sprinkle the raw sugar on top.
Brush the pie with the egg wash and sprinkle with the raw sugar. Cut four slits in the top of the pie to create a vent.

Carefully remove the hot baking sheet from the oven and place the pie dish on top, then return to the oven and bake for 40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through, until the crust is golden brown and the juices are bubbling.
Let the pie cool completely before slicing and serving.
Enjoy!
